stories.title: Cameron Young Enters Cadillac Championship Final Round With 6-Shot Lead

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Cameron Young tees off this morning at Doral with a 6-shot lead.

15-under. Scheffler and Kim T2 at -9.

Final round moved up due to rain — early finish expected.

Biggest lead a player has carried into a final round at a Signature Event all season. 🏆

#CadillacChampionship

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Cameron Young wins the Cadillac Championship.

6-shot lead held. Blue Monster conquered.

First major Signature Event win for Young. Scheffler and Kim T2.

The 2026 PGA Tour season just got another marquee champion. 🏌️

#CadillacChampionship

article.headline: Cameron Young Carries Six-Shot Lead Into Cadillac Championship Final Round at Doral

stories.title: Nelly Korda Eyeing Back-to-Back Riviera Maya Crown with 3-Shot Lead

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Nelly Korda leads the Riviera Maya Open by 3 shots entering the final round.

14-under. Eagle on 18 yesterday sealed the advantage.

World No. 1. HOF countdown. 3-shot lead. Back-to-back win possible.

She just wins. ⛳

#LPGATour #RivieraMayaOpen

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Nelly Korda wins the Riviera Maya Open.

Back-to-back titles at Mayakoba. Third win of 2026.

She now has 22 of 27 Hall of Fame points. 5 away from immortality.

This is a historic LPGA season in real time.

#LPGATour #NellyKorda

stories.title: Regions Tradition — Stewart Cink Leads PGA Tour Champions Major Entering Final Round

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Stewart Cink wins the Regions Tradition.

4 wins in 2026 on PGA Tour Champions. 2 majors. Dominant season.

The 52-year-old is on a run that the Champions Tour hasn't seen in years.

What a career resurgence. 🏆

#RegionsTradition #PGATourChampions

article.headline: Stewart Cink Is Running Away With the PGA Tour Champions Season — Regions Tradition Title Extends His Dominance

stories.title: LIV Golf Virginia Arrives Next Week — Rahm Returns to DC Hot After Mexico City

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Jon Rahm won LIV Mexico City by 6. DeChambeau's wrist healed. Niemann defends.

LIV Golf Virginia is May 7-10 at Trump National DC.

$30 million. Four days. The circus comes to Washington.

Full preview: golfanrecap.com

#LIVGolf #LIVVirginia

stories.title: Scheffler's Doral Redemption — World No. 1 Charging From 7 Back

x_posts.label: Post 5-1
x_posts.text:
Scottie Scheffler was 7 back after Round 1 at Doral.

He's 9-under through three rounds. In the final group. Paired with Young.

Didn't win — but the comeback from that stumble tells you everything about why he's World No. 1.

#CadillacChampionship

x_posts.label: Post 5-2
x_posts.text:
Adam Scott took a wrong ball penalty in Round 3 at Doral.

Then shot 66 anyway.

That's vintage Adam Scott. Still one of the most elegant players in the game.

What a round. ⛳

#CadillacChampionship #AdamScott

article.headline: Scheffler's Week at Doral: What a Comeback From 7 Back Tells Us About the World No. 1
